roa.docketEntryComment: Complaint
PROBATION UPDATED PER AB 1950
TO SET DEF MOTION TO SUPPRESS PC1538,5FILED

/TWS/CH4 ISS CPROB PROB 3 Y PJ 2 D/CTS 2/PF145 18/VF2 150/FOP1 3 MONTH/LCEM/LVAL/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN//X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/X:AS TO COUNT 3, SENTENCEIS AS FOLLOWS:/TWS/CH3:CJ 1 D /CTS:1 /VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/CTORD:BASED ON TIME IN CUSTODY OF $125 A DAY, CUSTODY CREDITS TO BE DEDUCTED FROMTOTAL FINE AMOUNT/CTORD:RESTITUTION FINE ON BOTH COUNTS ARE WAIVED AND ICNA AND COA FEES ARESTAYED/

/CAL:DISPO/X:AMEND TO ADD  COUNT 4, VC 23103 PURSUANT TO 23103,5 VC WETRECKLESS, A MISDEMEANOR/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:3 AND 4/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:PRETRIAL & PROOF OF AA/NP/X:INSUFFICIENT PROOF IS PROVIDED/12    XPROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO 06-06-18/X: BAIL SET AT $10,000,/CONTD:BW STAY/DOPC/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:THE PEOPLE FILED FIRST AMENDED MISDEMEANOR COMPLAINT/AMENDCOM:CHARGING COUNT 001, 23152 (A) VC A MISDEMEANOR; COUNT 002, 23152 (B) VC A MISDEMEANOR; COUNT 003 12500(A) VC A MISDEMEANOR/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/MVARS/GTWM/X:THE PEOPLE ORALLY REQUESTED THE DEFENDANT TO WEAR SCRAM/X:THE PEOPLE'S ORAL REQUEST FOR THE DEFENDANT TO WEAR SCRAM WAS DENIED/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT TO ATTEND TWO AA MEETINGS A WEEK/X:DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMUR/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/X:THE DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE IS WAIVED IF PROOF OF AA MEETINGS IS PROVIDED/
/TEXT TRANS TO DEPT 27/TRANS 27 FORTHWITH FOR DISPOSITION/
